pageContext.name: Star Wars Celebration on the Go Lunch Cooler
pageContext.description: Make your Star Wars Celebration last all year with this portable cooler lunch bag. The Star Wars Celebration On The Go Lunch Cooler has impressive space, velcro side straps ensure the strength to carry heavy items without worry.  This lunch cooler also features a zippered compartment for dry items and an easy-clean cooler section. Celebrate your Star Wars fandom every day with this rugged cooler tote!  *Surface wash with a damp cloth only. Spot clean. Do not immerse in water. Dry immediately.
